faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Oakwood, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Oakwood typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and treatment method used. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before any work begins.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Oakwood homes?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments take 2-4 hours for an average-sized Oakwood home. Heat treatments are completed in one day, while chemical treatments may require a follow-up visit within 2-3 weeks to ensure complete elimination of all life stages.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for my Oakwood family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved treatments that are safe when applied by our certified technicians. For chemical treatments, we recommend keeping pets and children away for 2-4 hours. Heat treatments are completely chemical-free and safe for immediate re-entry.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day bed bug service in Oakwood, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer same-day and emergency bed bug treatment services throughout Oakwood and surrounding Staten Island neighborhoods. Call us before noon for potential same-day service, and we'll dispatch a technician to your location as quickly as possible.
